codebook_title: Existential Codebook for the 12 Fundamental Existential Prerequisites (12 FEPs)
author: Alfried Längle (Adapted for Coding)

apa_citations.Längle, 2002b: Längle, A. (2002). Existential fundamental motivation. In Motivation, Consciousness and Self-Regulation (pp. 27–42). Nova Science Pub Inc.
apa_citations.Längle, 2011: Längle, A. (2011). The Existential Fundamental Motivations Structuring the Motivational Process. In D. A. Leontiev (Ed.), Motivation, Consciousness and Self-Regulation (pp. 27–42). Nova Science Publishers.

llm_coding_instructions: Analyze the participant's testimony for evidence of their 'emotionally free (decided) stand' or 'Inner Consent' (Längle, 2002b).
Score each FEP from 0 (Not Present) to 5 (Fully Present).
The score must be justified by identifying a direct quote or summary from the testimony that aligns with the 'Indicators of Presence' or 'Indicators of Absence' (Coping Reactions/Deficits).
Do not use external concepts; limit justification language to the provided Längle-derived quotes and terms.

scoring_rubric.0: Not Present: Failure to meet the prerequisite; reliant on basic coping reactions/deficits. (Längle, 2002b)
scoring_rubric.3: Moderate Presence: Active in the 'continuous dialogue (preoccupation)'; partial 'inner agreement' and 'decisiveness' mobilization. (Längle, 2002b; Längle, 2011)
scoring_rubric.5: Fully Present: Unbroken 'Inner Consent'; 'deepest and freest emotions correspond' to intentions, reflecting a 'fulfilled existence'. (Längle, 2002b; Längle, 2011)

fundamental_motivations.core_question: I am - can I be? (Längle, 2002b, p. 27)

presence_indicators: 'To be there' and 'not to flee' (Längle, 2002b, p. 28)
Trust in the world (Längle, 2011, p. 28)
absence_indicators: Insecurity and fear (Längle, 2002b, p. 28)
Basic reaction: avoidance or flight (Längle, 2002b, p. 28)

presence_indicators: Ready to occupy the space (Längle, 2002b, p. 28)
To 'let each other be, because there is still enough space for me' (Längle, 2011, p. 28)
absence_indicators: Restlessness (Längle, 2002b, p. 28)
Overactivity/compulsive washing (Längle, 2002b, p. 28)

presence_indicators: To 'endure' what is difficult or unalterable (Längle, 2002b, p. 28)
The force to 'tolerate' what cannot be changed (Längle, 2002b, p. 28)
absence_indicators: Lacking the 'fundamental trust' (Längle, 2011, p. 28)
Inability to 'endure' the negative sides (Längle, 2002b, p. 28)

fundamental_motivations.core_question: I am alive - do I like this fact? (Längle, 2002b, p. 29)

presence_indicators: 'I seize life, engage in it, when I turn to other people' (Längle, 2002b, p. 30)
Experience of worth and worthlessness (Längle, 2011, p. 30)
absence_indicators: Negligence in one's life style (Längle, 2002b, p. 30)
Basic coping reaction: regression (Längle, 2002b, p. 30)

presence_indicators: 'Do I take time for valuable things, worthy to spend my time for?' (Längle, 2002b, p. 30)
Engaging in relationships for which I spend time (Längle, 2002b, p. 30)
absence_indicators: Shallowness of daily life (Längle, 2002b, p. 30)
Activism in the form of overprotection or achievement (Längle, 2002b, p. 30)

presence_indicators: 'Willingness to let myself be touched' by what is valuable (Längle, 2002b, p. 30)
'To turn to' will 'make life vibrate within me' (Längle, 2002b, p. 30)
absence_indicators: Aggression: fury, rage to 'agitate the other person' (Längle, 2002b, p. 30)

fundamental_motivations.core_question: I am myself - may I be like this? (Längle, 2002b, p. 31)

presence_indicators: 'Demarcate myself' and to 'stand by my own' (Längle, 2002b, p. 32)
'Encounter' makes me find my 'own 'I' in the 'you'' (Längle, 2002b, p. 32)
absence_indicators: Solitude (Längle, 2002b, p. 32)
Basic reaction: distancing oneself (Längle, 2002b, p. 32)

presence_indicators: The active part is to 'refuse whatever does not correspond to me' (Längle, 2002b, p. 32)
Regret as one of the two means to live authenticity (Längle, 2002b, p. 32)
absence_indicators: Activism: stubborn insistence and leading a functional life (Längle, 2002b, p. 32)
Need to hide behind the shame (Längle, 2011, p. 32)

presence_indicators: Feeling entitled to be what I am (Längle, 2002b, p. 32)
The ability to stand by their uniqueness (Längle, 2002b, p. 32)
absence_indicators: Aggressive reaction: indignation, annoyance anger, reproach (Längle, 2002b, p. 32)
Freezing type: dissociation/splitting of emotion and cognition (Längle, 2002b, p. 32)

fundamental_motivations.core_question: I am there - for what is it good? (Längle, 2002b, p. 33)

presence_indicators: 'Phenomenological attitude'/'attitude of openness' (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)
Recognition of 'what my life is all about' (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)
absence_indicators: Fails systematically to reach meaning (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)
Loss of interest and apathy (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)

presence_indicators: Active part is to 'bring myself into agreement with the situation' (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)
Examining if action is a 'good thing... for my environment' (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)
absence_indicators: 'Planless, day-to-day attitude toward life' (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)
Freezing types: fatalism and probably nihilism (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)

prerequisites.fep_name: Value to be realized in the future
presence_indicators: Deciding for 'the most valuable, realistic possibility' (Existential meaning) (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)
Living out of Self-transcendence (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)
absence_indicators: 'Provisional attitude towards life' (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)
Disorders at this level mainly lead to addictions (Längle, 2002b, p. 34)
